problems.text: In a five-story house, Maia lives above Pablo but below Rafael, and Jaylon lives below Pablo. If Jaylon lives on the 2nd floor, on what floor does Maia live?
problems.label: Floor:

problems.text: A big square is divided into small squares. If the smallest one has area of 1, what is the area of the shaded square?

Amelia bakes some cookies. She gives half the cookies to her friend and eats 4. She then gives half of the remaining cookies to her older sister. Amelia now has 2 cookies remaining. How many cookies did Amelia bake?
Hanna has a drawer with 5 red, 7 green, and 3 blue socks in it. How many times does she need to draw a sock at random from the drawer to be sure she has at least one matching pair?
Aarav is 6th in an ice cream line. Ivaan is 8th in the same line but counted from the end of the line. If there are 3 children between Aarav and Ivaan, how many children are in the line?
